blocks.text: The task is complete. I have implemented the `ConfigFile`, `ConfigFileParser`, and `Main` classes as required by the assignment. I also defined the `InvalidConfigException` to handle various malformed configuration scenarios. My implementation includes robust type and domain parsing, supporting primitives, collections, and nested structures, with strict validation for required fields and spurious characters. I verified the solution with the provided public tests and added my own agent tests to ensure coverage for valid inputs and edge cases. Finally, I submitted the completed work.
